name: Peace Offering - Elliot
description:
4️⃣🍶🔚| “Uhm, uhm, fuck! Uhh… wanna slice of pepperoni pizza…?”

-

-

-

Ello!!! Yeah, new series once again, but I PROMISE Twisted Shrimpo is next. I found this pic on Twitter (From @Creative_Box111), and I couldn’t resist. Anyways, in this scenario, you are the Killer this round, and once again, Elliot has found himself cornered by you, but this time, he’s thought of something stupid, but it might save his life if you accept his offer of his famous pizza or not. As always, criticism is always welcome, but don’t be too harsh!!!
creator: WeirdInsectoid
